title: On-Chain Identity
subtitle: ENS, SBTs, and Decentralized Identity
description: Build identity systems on-chain — ENS names, soul-bound tokens, attestations, and decentralized identifiers. Self-sovereign identity for Web3.

lessons.title: ENS Deep Dive
lessons.description: How Ethereum Name Service works — registration, resolution, and records.

lessons.title: Decentralized Identifiers
lessons.description: DIDs, verifiable credentials, and self-sovereign identity standards.
lessons.topics: DIDs, W3C VC, Self-sovereign identity, Attestations

lessons.title: Soul-Bound Identity
lessons.description: Using non-transferable tokens for persistent on-chain identity.
lessons.topics: SBTs, Identity tokens, Reputation, Attestation schema

lessons.title: Sign-In with Ethereum (SIWE)
lessons.description: How SIWE works — message format, verification, and session management.
lessons.topics: SIWE, Message signing, Session management, Nonce verification

lessons.title: Identity for Agents
lessons.description: Giving AI agents on-chain identity — wallets, signing, and reputation.
lessons.topics: Agent wallets, Delegated signing, Agent identity, Reputation
